tips.title: Keyboard Input
tips.desc: Type numbers and operators directly. Use Enter to calculate, Backspace to delete, and Escape to clear all.

tips.title: Paste Expressions
tips.desc: Paste any math expression with Ctrl+V (or Cmd+V on Mac). Supports complex expressions like sqrt((9*9)/12).

tips.title: Type Function Names
tips.desc: Type function names directly on your keyboard — sqrt, sin, cos, tan, ln, exp, abs, log10, floor, ceil, pi, and more. Recognized within 700ms.

tips.title: Scientific Mode
tips.desc: Toggle the SCIENTIFIC bar to access trig, logarithms, exponents, constants, rounding, and more.

tips.title: Calculation Tape
tips.desc: Press TAPE to view your full calculation history. Delete individual entries or clear all at once.

tips.title: Session per Browser
tips.desc: Each browser keeps its own session automatically. Your history stays separate across different browsers.

tips.title: Chain from Result
tips.desc: After a calculation, press any operator (+, -, etc.) to continue from the previous result.
